meeting.noActionItems: No action items identified in this meeting.
meeting.recipientsRequired: Please add at least one recipient.
meeting.feedbackPrompt: Was this analysis accurate? Let us know if the AI missed anything or made a mistake. Your feedback directly trains the AI for your future meetings.
meeting.thankYouFeedback: Thank you! Your feedback has been sent to our team to improve the AI model.
meeting.feedbackPlaceholder: e.g., 'The AI missed an action item about the Q3 budget' or 'It misunderstood speaker B's name.'

settings.title: Settings & Privacy
settings.howItWorks: Audio is sent securely to Google Gemini for analysis. Your meeting history and transcripts are stored locally on your device unless you enable cloud sync.
settings.cloudSaveDesc: Store meeting content on our servers for access from any device and to generate share links.
settings.cloudSaveUpgrade: Upgrade to Pro to save meetings to the cloud and share them.
settings.storeAudioDesc: Save the audio file along with the transcript. Turn off to save space and increase privacy.
settings.sessionReplayDesc: Allow session recording for product improvement. Records clicks and scrolls for analytics.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all local meeting history? This cannot be undone.

auth.name: Name
auth.whereKnowUs: Where did you hear about us?
auth.passwordHint: Must be at least 8 characters, with 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 number.
auth.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

pages.signupSubtitle: Create your account to get started

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We help teams turn meetings into actionable outcomes.
about.missionDesc: To make every meeting count by capturing what matters and turning it into clear next steps.
about.visionDesc: A world where no insight is lost and every team moves faster with AI-powered meeting intelligence.
about.aiPoweredDesc: Powered by Gemini for accurate transcription and smart summaries.
about.teamFirstDesc: Designed for collaboration with share-ready notes and action items.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Send us a message.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectionDesc: We collect information you provide when signing up (name, email, phone) and meeting data you choose to record and analyze. We use this to provide our services and improve your experience.
privacy.usageDesc: Your data is used to generate meeting summaries, action items, and transcripts. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.storageDesc: Meeting data can be stored locally in your browser or in the cloud if you enable cloud save (Pro plan). You control where your data lives.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may use analytics cookies to improve our service.
privacy.rightsDesc: You can access, update, or delete your account and data at any time from your profile settings.
privacy.contactDesc: For privacy questions, contact us at hello@meetingcopilot.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: By using Meeting Copilot, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.serviceDesc: Meeting Copilot provides AI-powered meeting transcription, summarization, and analysis. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service.
terms.obligationsDesc: You agree to use the service lawfully, obtain consent before recording, and not misuse the platform or its outputs.
terms.limitationsDesc: The service is provided as-is. We are not liable for accuracy of AI outputs or any indirect damages.
terms.terminationDesc: We may suspend or terminate your account for violations. You may delete your account at any time.
terms.contactDesc: For questions about these terms, contact us at hello@meetingcopilot.app.

checkout.title: Choose Your Plan
checkout.subtitle: Select a plan and apply a promo code if you have one.
checkout.promoRequired: A valid promo code is required to upgrade to a paid plan.
checkout.signInRequiredDesc: Please sign in or create an account to complete checkout.

profile.updateDetails: Update your account details and public profile.
profile.passwordSecurity: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.planBillingDesc: Upgrade your plan for more minutes and features, or cancel to return to the free plan.
profile.cancelPlanConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your plan? You will be downgraded to the free Starter plan and lose access to cloud save.
profile.planDowngraded: Your plan has been downgraded to Starter.
profile.cloudSaveDesc: Store meeting notes in the cloud for access across devices.
profile.cloudSaveProOnly: Cloud save is available on Pro plan.
profile.changeEmailDesc: Update your email address. You will receive a verification link at the new address.
profile.emailChangeRequested: Verification email sent. Check your new inbox.
profile.emailChanged: Email updated successfully. Please sign in again.
profile.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app.
profile.scanQRCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
profile.backupCodesDesc: Save these codes in a secure place. Each can only be used once.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

hero.title: Turn every meeting into
hero.subtitle: Record once, then get a transcript, concise summary, action items, decisions, and a follow-up email your team can use immediately.
hero.lovedBy: Loved by fast-moving teams that need clean notes, decisions, and owners right after every call.

cta.title: Ready to turn meetings into action?
cta.subtitle: Start free in seconds. No credit card required.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: A clear 3-step flow from conversation to share-ready notes.
how.recordDesc: Capture audio from your microphone, a meeting tab, or both.
how.analyzeDesc: Generate transcript, concise summary, action items, decisions, and sentiment.
how.shareDesc: Send notes to your team or attach a summary back to your calendar event.
how.recordMock: Capturing microphone and tab audio simultaneously...
how.analyzeMock: Generating transcript, summary, and action items with AI...
how.shareMock: One-click share to calendar, email, or team workspace.

features.title: Built for real meetings
features.subtitle: Stay present in the conversation while the copilot handles documentation.
features.captureDesc: Record mic audio, a meeting tab (Google Meet), or both mixed together.
features.speakerDesc: Get a readable transcript with speakers separated for fast scanning.
features.speakerImpact: Find ownership and context quickly after the call.
features.actionDesc: Extract clear next steps with confidence scores so nothing slips.
features.actionImpact: Turn discussion into execution in minutes.
features.multiDesc: Generate notes in your preferred language—keep the meeting's original tone.
features.multiImpact: Share updates clearly with global teams.
features.calendarDesc: Attach summaries back to the calendar event when you choose to.
features.calendarImpact: Keep context where your team already works.
features.consentDesc: Audio is uploaded only when you click Analyze. Local storage is optional.
features.consentImpact: Built to support trust and compliance from day one.

privacy.title: Privacy & security, by design
privacy.subtitle: Meeting Copilot is built to be transparent about what is uploaded, what is stored, and who can access it.
privacy.consentDesc: Audio is uploaded only when you click Analyze (and confirm consent).
privacy.aiDesc: Audio is processed by Gemini to generate transcripts and meeting artifacts.
privacy.storageDesc: Local history is optional. When you sign in, artifacts can sync to your workspace across devices.
privacy.leastDesc: Workspace access is restricted to members (multi-tenant rules).

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, then upgrade only when your team needs more monthly minutes and advanced capabilities.
pricing.planLimits: Plan limits are enforced by monthly minutes quotas.
pricing.loadError: We couldn't load pricing plans right now. You can still start free—no credit card required.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions.
faq.a1: No. When you record tab audio, the app requests tab capture to access the audio track, then immediately stops the video track.
faq.a2: Only when you click Analyze (and confirm consent). Recording alone does not upload anything.
faq.a3: You can keep history locally in your browser. If you sign in, meeting artifacts can sync to your workspace for access across devices.
faq.q4: Can I use it with Google Meet?
faq.a4: Yes. You can record tab audio from Meet, and optionally open the app via the companion Chrome extension.
faq.a5: Plans enforce monthly minutes quotas. You can start free and upgrade in-app when you need more.
faq.q6: Can it attach notes to my calendar?
faq.a6: Yes. When connected to Google Calendar, you can attach a meeting summary to an event with one click.
faq.reachOut: Our team is ready to help. Get in touch anytime.

footer.tagline: Turn every meeting into clear next steps with AI-powered transcription, summaries, and action items.

socialProof.quote1: Finally, meeting notes that actually get used. Our standups are 10x more productive.
socialProof.quote2: The action items extraction is spot-on. No more 'who said they'd do what?' in Slack.
socialProof.quote3: Consent-first and privacy-focused. Exactly what we needed for client calls.

shared.meetingNotFoundDesc: This meeting link may be invalid or has expired.

common.offline: You're offline. Cached meetings are available for viewing.

joyride.step1: Choose what you want to record: your microphone, a browser tab (like Google Meet), or both.
joyride.step2: Record from your microphone only—ideal for in-person meetings or phone calls.
joyride.step3: Record audio from a browser tab—perfect for Google Meet, Zoom, or other web meetings.
joyride.step4: Click here to start recording your meeting.
joyride.step5: Already have a recording? Upload an audio file to get a transcript and summary.
joyride.step6: Verify your microphone is working before you start recording.
joyride.step7: View your overview, recent meetings, usage stats, and quick actions.
joyride.step8: Click here anytime to start a new meeting recording.
joyride.step9: Access your past meeting transcripts, summaries, and action items here.
joyride.step10: Get help from our team—chat with support anytime.
joyride.step11: Track your recording minutes used and remaining this month.
joyride.step12: Open your profile menu for Settings, Sign out, and usage info.
